decontamination_notes: Original scenario written for VulcanBench on 2026-06-28 for the carbyne tier; the house code and rubric are not derived from any existing repository, so they post-date all model training cutoffs.

blocking: merge returns the minimal sorted list of non-overlapping intervals covering the same points, merging intervals that overlap OR merely touch (share an endpoint, e.g. (1,2) and (2,3) -> (1,3)), and it works for inputs given in any order.
The change modifies only the module and adds no dependency.

weighted.criterion: It sorts the intervals first and merges when the next start is <= the current end (so touching intervals merge), rather than using a strict < or skipping the sort.
